title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a text generation model that applies diffusion-based image generation techniques to achieve over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The model uses uniform state diffusion with bidirectional attention across multiple passes to refine text from noise, shifting inference from memory-bound to compute-bound operations. The video benchmarks the model on practical tasks including building a finance dashboard and arcade game.
writeup: The video covers DiffusionGemma, a text generation model from Google DeepMind that adapts diffusion-based image generation to language, reaching over 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. Rather than generating tokens sequentially, the model uses uniform state diffusion with bidirectional attention across multiple passes, refining text from noise and shifting inference from memory-bound to compute-bound operations. This matters because the throughput gain comes from a structural change in how decoding works, not just hardware scaling. The video benchmarks the model on practical tasks including building a finance dashboard and an arcade game.
